component.name: Linxira Gaming Manager
component.summary: Deploy and manage game libraries, compatibility tools, and backups

description.p: Linxira Gaming Manager deploys a reviewed Steam and compatibility environment through an immutable package plan, discovers Steam libraries and imported games, reports installed tools, launches games with fixed argument arrays, and creates explicit restic backups.
Library, launch, and backup operations run as the signed-in user. Gaming setup requests administrator authorization only for the fixed catalog-bound Linxira Components transaction.
